What I Bring to the Table

Every seller gets the full package — no cutting corners.

Free Home Value Report in Minutes

Submit your info and get a personalized Home Value Report within minutes — so you know exactly what your home is worth before we even meet.

Professional Photography

Every listing gets high-quality, professionally shot photos that make buyers stop scrolling and start scheduling showings.

Strategic Pricing

Data-driven pricing backed by real comparable sales in your neighborhood — priced to attract serious offers fast.

Home Prep Guidance

I'll walk through your home and tell you exactly what small changes can boost your sale price — no expensive renovations needed.

Maximum Exposure

Your home gets listed on the MLS, Zillow, Realtor.com, social media, and more — seen by thousands of active buyers.

Se Habla Español

Bilingual service in English and Spanish so every client feels heard, understood, and confident throughout the process.

How It Works

Three simple steps to selling your home for top dollar.

1

Submit Your Info

Fill out the quick form below with your property details. It takes less than 2 minutes.

2

Get Your Free Home Value Report

I'll send you a personalized Home Value Report within minutes showing what your home is worth based on recent comparable sales.

3

Schedule a Walkthrough

I'll visit your home in person to give you the most accurate price based on your upgrades and unique features.

This home value report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal. It should not be considered the equivalent of an appraisal.

About Jenise

I'm Jenise Buckalew — a NJ State Licensed REALTOR®, proud mother of five, and an independent agent with Green Light Realty LLC. With over 20 years of experience and hundreds of successful transactions, I specialize in helping homeowners across Middlesex, Monmouth, and Ocean Counties get the best value for their biggest investment.

I'm a recurring NJ REALTORS® Circle of Excellence award winner with a perfect 5.0 Zillow rating. I believe every seller deserves hands-on, personalized service — from a free professional CMA to expert home prep advice and professional photography. My goal is simple: sell your home for top dollar, as fast as possible.

Green Light Realty LLC operates three offices — one in Ocean County and two in Middlesex County — giving my clients broad reach across Central New Jersey.
